#

![Screen Recording 2026-03-22 at 6 48 55 PM](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/00a2aba1-00c0-4c3c-becc-306ba576e7b7)


# Pokedex

A Flutter-based Pokedex web page that utilizes the [PokeAPI](https://pokeapi.co/docs/v2#pokemon).

## 🚀 Features
- **Pokémon List**
  - Scroll pagination with PokeAPI's `next` URL
  - Displays up to 20 Pokémon per page
  - Auto-load next page when scrolling to bottom
  
- **Pokémon Cards**
  - Each card displays Pokémon's name and image
  - The detail information including Pokémon's types and abilities can be overlayed as a bubble if mouse cursor is hovered.
  - Tap on a card to flip

- **Search**
  - Users can search specific Pokémon by name

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Flutter - 3.41.1
- **State Management**: Riverpod
- **HTTP Client**: Dio
- **API**: [PokéAPI](https://pokeapi.co/)
- **Web Hostring**: http://minji-pokedex-flutter-web.s3-website-ap-southeast-2.amazonaws.com/
